subcodes.title: Saqi az Ghayb-i-Baqa
subcodes.first_line: Lift up the veil from Thy face, O Cup-Bearer of the hidden Realm of Immortality, That I may taste the wine of eternal life
subcodes.first_line_orig: ساقی از غیب بقا برقع برافکن از عذار تا بنوشم خمر باقی از جمال کردگار آنچه در
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @Christ; Christianity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @mystical themes, @Mosaic imagery
